# delaunator-cpp

This directory vendors `delaunator-cpp` for fast 2D Delaunay triangulation in the terrain TIN builder.

- Upstream: https://github.com/delfrrr/delaunator-cpp
- License: MIT, see `LICENSE`
- Notices: see `THIRD-PARTY-NOTICES`
- Current use: `src/domain/terrain/TerrainTinBuilder.cpp`

Only the single header `include/delaunator.hpp` is used. Keep the upstream license and notices when updating this dependency.
